scripts.azurite:up: docker compose -f docker/azurite/docker-compose.yml up -d && wait-on tcp:10000 tcp:10001 tcp:10002 && npm run azurite:setup
scripts.clean: tsc -b --clean && npm run clean --workspaces --if-present && find . -type f \( -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -o -name '*.d.ts.map' -o -name '*.js.map' -o -name '*.d.ts' -o -name '*.log' \) -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -delete && find . -mindepth 3 -type f -name '*.js' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -delete
scripts.start: wait-on tcp:10000 tcp:10001 tcp:10002 && pm2 start platform.config.cjs && wait-on tcp:7071
scripts.start:ingress: wait-on tcp:10000 tcp:10001 tcp:10002 && pm2 start platform.config.cjs --only ingress-api && wait-on tcp:7071
scripts.start:orchestrator: wait-on tcp:10000 tcp:10001 tcp:10002 && pm2 start platform.config.cjs --only browser-orchestrator
scripts.teardown: npm run azurite:down && npx pm2 kill || true && pkill -f "func start" || true && pkill -f "node services/browser-orchestrator/dist/index.js" || true
